prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical full-body fashion portrait of a beautiful young woman walking confidently toward the camera in a luxurious hotel lobby at night. She has long dark brown to black wavy hair styled over one shoulder, medium-light skin, and her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur for privacy. She wears an elegant dark indigo denim off-shoulder jumpsuit with a wide layered ruffle neckline, fitted waist, long straight-leg pants, and a matching fabric belt tied at the front-right side. Add tasteful gold accessories: exactly 4 visible jewelry/accessory items, consisting of hoop earrings, a delicate necklace with a small pendant, a bracelet, and a wristwatch. She carries one small black clutch in her right hand and wears black pointed-toe heels. The setting is a grand warm-toned lobby with glossy cream marble floors, chandeliers overhead, soft golden bokeh lights in the background, blurred columns and furniture, and a refined upscale atmosphere. Use shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, cinematic warm lighting, centered composition, natural walking pose, full-body framing from head to shoes, vertical 4:5, high-end editorial fashion photography style, no visible text, no watermark, no extra people.
